sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, published 2026-02-24): more than 2,000 Ascended Heroes booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 20.37% ±1.70, Ultra Rare 4.81% ±0.90, Mega Attack Rare 3.47% ±0.77, Illustration Rare 11.25% ±1.33, Special Illustration Rare 1.44% ±0.50, Mega Hyper Rare 0.19% ±0.18. Ascended Heroes is the largest English set ever; the new Mega Attack Rare effectively replaces an Ultra Rare in the packs where it appears (~3% of the difference from the ~8% UR rate of earlier Mega sets). God Packs (three Mega Attack Rares + seven SIRs) were not observed and are not modelled. No ACE SPEC or regular Hyper Rare tier. The article's per-card 'Any Ultra Rare' sub-table lists 20.77% — a transcription slip duplicating the Double Rare row; the summary table, the ~5% prose, and the per-card math (0.34%×14) all agree on 4.81%, used here.
